properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v4 v6 v7 v8 v7 v9

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We lift our hands in the sanctuary We lift our hands to give You the glory We lift our hands to give You the praise And we will praise You for the rest of our days Yes, we will praise You for the rest of our days

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We clap our hands in the sanctuary We clap our hands to give you the glory We clap our hands to give you the praise And we will praise you for the rest of our days Yes, we will praise you for the rest of our days

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We sing our song in the sanctuary We sing our song to give You the glory We sing our song to give You the praise And we will praise You for the rest of our days Yes, we will praise You for the rest of our days

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Jesus, we give You the praise Emmanuel, we lift up Your name Heavenly Father, coming Messiah And we will praise You for the rest of our days Yes, we will praise You for the rest of our days

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Hallelujah in the sanctuary Hallelujah we give You the glory Hallelujah we give You the praise And we will praise You for the rest of our days Yes, we will praise You for the rest of our days

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: /: Yes, yes, Lord for the rest of our days :/ 6x

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: /: Hallelujah, hallelujah Hallelujah for the rest of our days :/ 3x

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: /: Yes, yes, Lord for the rest of our days :/ 3x

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: And we will praise You for the rest of our days
